use_cases: Display real-time cryptocurrency price data with candlestick, line, and area chart visualizations
Enable users to switch between different timeframes (1h, 1d, 1w, 1m) for market analysis
Show price changes and percentage changes for informed trading decisions
Provide interactive hover tooltips for detailed data point inspection
Integrate into fintech dashboards and crypto trading platforms for market monitoring
ai_summary: A dynamic cryptocurrency market chart component featuring candlestick, line, and area visualization modes rendered on canvas. Supports multiple timeframes (1h, 1d, 1w, 1m) with interactive hover tooltips displaying OHLCV data. Includes real-time price tracking with change percentages and a dark-themed flat design optimized for financial dashboards and trading interfaces.
